title: Amoria bordsilovskyi
taxonomy: Amoria bordsilovskyi is a species of sea snail, specifically a marine gastropod mollusk in the family Veneridae. It belongs to the genus Amoria and is classified within the phylum Mollusca. Amoria bordsilovskyi falls under the subphylum Vetigastropoda, which includes snails with a distinctive shell shape and characteristics. The species classification is further refined to the family level, where it is part of the Veneridae family. Amoria bordsilovskyi's classification reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history as a marine snail.
